category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Vietnam) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Vietnam Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入越南：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入越南：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Vietnam requirements: TCVN/QCVN conformity with the CR mark (chung nhan hop quy) administered by STAMEQ under the Ministry of Science and Technology, TCVN IEC 62133 cell safety, MIC type approval for wireless functions, UN 38.3 transport, and the in-country importer obligation. Vietnam has no EU-style battery regulation.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与越南要求对照：依据TCVN/QCVN并加贴CR标志（chung nhan hop quy，由科学技术部下属STAMEQ管理）的合格评定、TCVN IEC 62133电芯安全、含无线功能产品的MIC型号核准、UN 38.3运输，以及在地进口商义务。越南没有欧盟式电池法规。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與越南要求對照：依據TCVN/QCVN並加貼CR標誌（chung nhan hop quy，由科學技術部下屬STAMEQ管理）的合格評定、TCVN IEC 62133電芯安全、含無線功能產品的MIC型號核准、UN 38.3運輸，以及在地進口商義務。越南沒有歐盟式電池法規。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment body determination, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Vietnam must meet TCVN/QCVN conformity assessment with the CR mark (chung nhan hop quy) where a QCVN applies, typically on a TCVN IEC 62133 basis, obtain MIC type approval for any wireless functions, hold a valid UN 38.3 transport report, and work through an in-country importer of record — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口越南，须在适用QCVN时完成TCVN/QCVN合格评定并加贴CR标志（chung nhan hop quy，通常以TCVN IEC 62133为基础），为任何无线功能取得MIC型号核准，持有有效的UN 38.3运输报告，并通过在地进口商办理——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口越南，須在適用QCVN時完成TCVN/QCVN合格評定並加貼CR標誌（chung nhan hop quy，通常以TCVN IEC 62133為基礎），為任何無線功能取得MIC型號核准，持有有效的UN 38.3運輸報告，並透過在地進口商辦理——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred.
